channel.title: Omnissa, LLC — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Omnissa, LLC (omnissa).

item.title: CVE-2025-25236 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Omnissa Workspace ONE UEM contains an observable response discrepancy vulnerability. A malicious actor may be able to enumerate sensitive information such as tenant ID and user accounts that could facilitate brute-force, password-spraying or credenti…

item.title: CVE-2025-25235 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Omnissa Secure Email Gateway (SEG) updates address Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability
item.description: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in Omnissa Secure Email Gateway (SEG) in SEG prior to 2.32 running on Windows and SEG prior to 2503 running on UAG allows routing of network traffic such as HTTP requests to internal networks.

item.title: CVE-2025-25229 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Omnissa Workspace ONE UEM contains a Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) Vulnerability. A malicious actor with user privileges may be able to access restricted internal system information, potentially enabling enumeration of internal network resources…

item.title: CVE-2025-25231 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Omnissa Workspace ONE UEM contains a Secondary Context Path Traversal Vulnerability. A malicious actor may be able to gain access to sensitive information by sending crafted GET requests (read-only) to restricted API endpoints.

item.title: CVE-2025-25234 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Omnissa UAG contains a Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) bypass vulnerability. A malicious actor with network access to UAG may be able to bypass administrator-configured CORS restrictions to gain access to sensitive networks.

item.title: CVE-2025-25230 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Omnissa Horizon Client for Windows contains an LPE Vulnerability. A malicious actor with local access where Horizon Client for Windows is installed may be able to elevate privileges.

item.title: CVE-2024-11468 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Omnissa Horizon Client for macOS contains a Local privilege escalation (LPE) Vulnerability due to a flaw in the installation process. Successful exploitation of this issue may allow attackers with user privileges to escalate their privileges to root…

item.title: CVE-2024-11467 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Omnissa Horizon Client for macOS contains a Local privilege escalation (LPE) Vulnerability due to a logic flaw. Successful exploitation of this issue may allow attackers with user privileges to escalate their privileges to root on the system where th…
